# STRAT.060 ? Feedback Loops

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** systems_thinking_applied
**Domain:** SYSTEMS_THINKING_APPLIED
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Reinforcing (amplifying); balancing (stabilizing); delays; causal loops; unintended consequences; dynamic complexity

## Application
Map feedback loops; identify reinforcing and balancing; account for delays; trace causality; anticipate side effects; dynamic thinking

## Key Values
- Loop awareness
- Delay recognition
- Causality mapping
- Consequence anticipation
- Dynamic thinking
